Petition Fot Order Modifying Trust Terms
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Ruth Downs Sullivan appearing for petitioner. Issue on how the modification would affect the trust and tax issue addressed. The remainder beneficiaries have filed their consents. Court is approving the modification. Court will review the order before signing it. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
